title: T-053 — E2E scanner-linked desktop cards + Production endpoint contract (SCR-08-12)
prompt:
# T-053 — E2E scanner deep-link cards + endpoint contract

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-12, §8.2.2, §8.2.3, 06-SCANNER-P1 cross-flow
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright spec covering the SCR-08-12 scanner-linked desktop cards pattern + the production endpoint contract consumed by 06-SCANNER-P1. Verifies that a Shift Lead can open a scanner deep-link card on `/production/wos/[id]/consume`, the generated JWT is valid for ≤15min single-use, and that posting consume-to-WO with that token updates Production read models and the consumption tab.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/production.spec.ts adds `test.describe('scanner deep-link cards')` block: open WO detail → consume tab → click `Open on Scanner`, capture JWT from QR/copy-link, post to `/api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo` with the token + a seeded LP, assert UI consumption tab refreshes with new LP scan log row.
2. Token assertions: signed with `SCANNER_JWT_SECRET`, claims `{wo_id, line_id, action='CONSUME_LP', operator_id, exp}` and `exp - iat <= 900` seconds; second POST with same token is rejected `401 token_replayed` (single-use claim).
3. apps/web/e2e/fixtures/production.ts adds helper to mint/verify JWT and to verify Production data has no mutation when only the card is rendered (no POST).
4. Playwright config retains trace/screenshot/video; tenant-scoped cleanup after run.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Shift Lead opens the consume tab and clicks `Open on Scanner`, when the card renders, then a JWT with claims `{wo_id, line_id, action='CONSUME_LP', operator_id, exp}` is visible (QR + copy-link), no Production row was mutated, and `exp - iat <= 900` seconds.
2. Given the JWT is used once via `POST /api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo`, when the request succeeds, then the consumption tab live-refreshes the LP scan log row; a second POST with the same token returns 401 `token_replayed` and no second consumption row is created.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then closeout lists trace/screenshot/video paths plus the `pnpm --filter web exec playwright test production.spec.ts -g "scanner deep-link cards"` command output.

## Test strategy
- RED: write the `scanner deep-link cards` describe + JWT mint/verify fixture before code exists; the spec must fail because the deep-link card and consume route are not in place.
- Run `pnpm --filter web exec playwright test production.spec.ts -g "scanner deep-link cards" --trace=on`
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let card rendering mutate Production data (issuance only).
- Do not bypass single-use / 15-min expiry semantics on the JWT.
- Do not log JWT contents server-side at INFO level (PII / replay risk).
- Do not assert against scanner PWA internals (06-SCANNER-P1 owns those).

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright spec asserting SCR-08-12 deep-link card issuance + Production scanner endpoint contract; JWT 15-min single-use, card-only render does not mutate data.

Asserts JWT claim set + 15-min expiry + single-use replay rejection. Fixture mints/verifies token. Card-only render proves zero data mutation. Tenant-scoped cleanup. Closeout includes trace/screenshot/video paths.
